title: monardella purpurea subsp. purpurea
intro: Monardella purpurea subsp. purpurea, also known as Purple Mountain Monardella, is a flowering plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae, native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal compounds. The health benefits of Monardella purpurea subsp. purpurea include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, such as congestion and coughs. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
